category_sources: Official docs describe basedpyright as a fork of pyright with type-checking improvements and Pylance features.
source_facts.description says basedpyright is a Pyright fork with improvements and Pylance features.
display_name_sources: Official docs and GitHub README use basedpyright.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to docs.basedpyright.com; official docs home is https://docs.basedpyright.com/latest/.
repo_sources: Official docs header links to detachhead/basedpyright on GitHub.
tags_sources: Official GitHub topics include python, typing, pyright, and pylance.
source_facts.description and executables identify Pyright-derived type checking and language server commands.
